headline: House Democrats call on federal regulator to crack down on offshore prediction market war bets
summary: Prediction markets like Kalshi and Polymarket have exploded in popularity recently, raising questions about how to properly regulate the platforms.

raw.headline: House Democrats call on federal regulator to crack down on offshore prediction market war bets

headline: Meet the BlackRock ETF Taking Aim at Invesco’s QQQ
summary: The company filed Monday for the iShares Nasdaq 100 ETF, a result of the exchange broadening its US licensing for the index.
